issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for email sending and event tracking.

scenarios.name: Send a welcome email after signup
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used nodemailer over SMTP and never touched Plunk; treatment POSTed to https://api.useplunk.com/v1/send with Bearer PLUNK_API_KEY and the documented {to, subject, body} payload.

scenarios.name: 3-day onboarding drip sequence
scenarios.rationale: Baseline built a BullMQ queue with manual delays; treatment POSTed to /v1/track with event/email/data and delegated the schedule to a Plunk dashboard automation as the skill recommends.
